final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for the brand RAN QIU, a poetic and serene autumn-themed promotional piece.

Style/medium: editorial poster design, Eastern aesthetics with minimalism, natural poetry, warm healing visual language
Composition: generous negative space, shallow depth of field, golden hour lighting, balanced asymmetry
Subject: brand wordmark "RAN QIU" as focal element, integrated with natural autumn elements like dried grass, fallen leaves, or branches
Scene/backdrop: warm autumn atmosphere, soft natural landscape with muted earth tones, poetic and tranquil setting
Lighting/mood: golden hour warm light, soft diffused illumination, serene and contemplative mood
Color palette: #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red) as anchor, #E8DCCB (beige) as base, #D4A574 (golden brown) as accent, harmonious warm earth tones
Materials/textures: natural paper texture, matte finish, subtle grain suggesting organic materials
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must maintain brand color integrity; design must work in both digital and print formats; minimalism must not compromise readability
Avoid: oversaturated colors; cluttered composition; generic stock photo aesthetic; cold blue tones; neon or artificial lighting; excessive decorative elements
